lightning_network.notes: Steady network growth. 24h node/channel creation spiked vs yesterday (17 vs 12 nodes, 244 vs 171 channels) but 30d trends stable. Capacity +$3.86M vs yesterday.

x402.description: A payments protocol for the internet. Built on HTTP.
x402.notes: Committed again today — actively maintained. Fork count climbing (+9 today). Issue count up +6 — active usage/bug reports.

day_over_day.notes: First collection on correct repo (aperture). Prev day had 404 on wrong repo.

l402.notes: Confirmed correct repo: lightninglabs/aperture. 254 stars, 63 forks. Last push Jan 27 — less actively developed than x402. This is the reference L402 implementation.
